title: BedwarsTextures MINI by MrNorym
description: This projects adds new texture of wool and mini swords for better fps and screen
body:
# WHAT IN TEXTURE PACK?

HI! This 16x16 texturepack is created for bedwars. I change a wool and swords.
Sword now is smaller and better.
Wool has fewer pixels. This is for better FPS.

This texture pack is my first texture pack, so its don't best his version. I do it better and better.

## PHOTO

![This is a wool in texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2edf0b68426872d9504a3a52e575fb63e9ec2216.jpeg)I like play beddwars and want to do a RP for you

![Sword in texture pack:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dd2ad18f0cb5b497c747e1cb72ad27e6b611aa6.jpeg)

### SO WHY YOU NEED TO DOWNLOAD IT?

Because if you play with it, your FPS will be better because new texture of wool contains fewer pixels! 
When there are fewer (multi-colored) pixels on the wool, your device needs to process the block a little less. This increases FPS.

THIS RESOURCE PACK ADDS A VERY SMALL AMOUNT OF FPS

### also

This resource pack also has a smaller sword texture, which slightly increases the field of view of the screen. It doesn't take up as much screen as in its original form. This way, you can see more when holding the sword in your hand than without the resource pack.

### WHAT IT ADDS?

So it's texture pack adds new textures for swords and wool in your minecraft! 

### WHERE I DO IT?

In photopea (website)

### BUT!

In texture pack NOT ALL wool change! I upgrade it immediately when I can.

That's all :)
